description: Real-world school digest with Valentine's Day party photos (past) and newsletter with future author visit

input_summary.subject: Feb 12, 2026 Digest: 2 new messages from Walnut Heights School today

events.title: Double Author Visit
events.location: Walnut Heights School, 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Author visit at school with book signing. Books can be pre-ordered through Rakestraw Bookstore.

events.title: Spring Music Showcase
events.description: TK and K music showcase. Livestream available.

events.title: Valentine’s Day Classroom Party (Room 102 - Kindergarten Koeltl)
events.location: Walnut Heights School (Room 102), 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Kindergarten Room 102 Valentine’s Day party mentioned in the post “Vday Party Photos” (posted Wed, Feb 11 at 7:19 PM). Party already occurred; message includes thanks to volunteers and a link to photos.

events.title: No School – Presidents Day Weekend
events.description: No school February 12th–16th for Presidents Day (as listed under “Upcoming Events” in the classroom newsletter image).

events.title: Double Author Visit (date changed)
events.location: Walnut Heights School, 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Two authors will visit the school on March 12 (date changed). If students want to order books to be signed on the day of the visit, orders should be placed through Rakestraw Bookstore; books will be delivered on the day of the visit and signed by the authors. Shipping address to use: 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596.

events.title: Spring Music Showcase (TK & Kindergarten)
events.location: Walnut Heights School – MPR, 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Spring Music Showcase for TK and Kindergarten students on Tuesday, March 24, 2026, 9:30–10:00 AM in the MPR. A livestream will be available for those who cannot attend in person; the link will be sent out a few days before the event. Contact: Mrs. Gold (jcousins@walnutcreeksd.org).
